SEARCH
Package net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.drawing.svg

Class XmlNode

java.lang.Object
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.drawing.svg.XmlNode
All Implemented Interfaces:
IElement
public class XmlNode extends Object implements IElement
A minimal, dependency-free DOM element, replicating just the subset of org.w3c.dom.Element that the SVG generation code relies on.

It exists so that an SVG document tree can be built and serialized under TeaVM, where javax.xml / org.w3c.dom are not available. The tree is built eagerly (like a DOM) so that attributes set late — once the final canvas size is known — are honored, then serialized to text in one pass via XmlWriter.

Attribute order is preserved (insertion order) to keep the output deterministic.

    • appendRaw

      public void appendRaw(String markup)
      Appends already-serialized markup, spliced verbatim (no escaping). Used for inlined SVG images.

    • getFirstChild

      public net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.drawing.svg.XmlContent getFirstChild()
      Returns the first child if this element has any content, else null. Mirrors org.w3c.dom.Node.getFirstChild(), used only to test whether an element is empty (so empty groups/links can be dropped).

    • writeTo

      public void writeTo(XmlWriter w)
      Serializes this element and its subtree into the given writer.

    • toXml

      public String toXml(int indentSpaces)
      Serializes this element as a standalone document fragment.
